creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Due to the vendor's repack of the distfile, you might meet with this problem 
with MASTER_SORT set.  However, the primary site (MASTER_SITES_LOCAL) still 
has the old distfile and thus md5 should match.  Please kill the file in 
DISTDIR and try fetching again without MASTER_SORT set.
